error_signature: Unexpected response from Salesforce Bulk API
title: Incorrect URL for Salesforce Bulk API
symptom: The response from the Salesforce Bulk API does not match the expected output, returning an empty records array instead. This indicates that the job was not created successfully.
not_this_if: Other Salesforce API requests work fine
root_cause: The error occurs because the user was using an incorrect URL format for the Salesforce Bulk API. The correct endpoint must include 'my.salesforce.com' instead of 'lightning.force.com' to properly access the Bulk API.
fix_steps: Change the API endpoint from 'https://domain.sandbox.lightning.force.com/services/data/v64.0/jobs/ingest/' to 'https://domain.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/services/data/v64.0/jobs/ingest/'
Retry the HTTP POST request with the updated URL.
agent_instruction: Update the Salesforce Bulk API URL to the correct format and retry the request.
